---
title: "In-situ aerial mapping of New Zealand Myrtaceae affected by Myrtle Rust (Austropuccinia psidii) using deep learning"
description: "Some information you want search engines to know about"

format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
    number-sections: true
    number-depth: 3
---

{{< include 00_abstract.qmd >}}


{{< include 01_introduction.qmd >}}


{{< include 02_method.qmd >}}
{{< include 03_results.qmd >}}
{{< include 04_discussion.qmd >}}
{{< include 05_conclusions.qmd >}}






{{< include 06_annex.qmd >}}
